category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a lossy speech compression library; official homepage distributes GSM 06.10 lossy speech compression source: https://www.quut.com/gsm/
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libgsm; official source archive is named gsm and Homebrew formula id is libgsm.
docs_sources: Official quut.com GSM page is the upstream source and best official documentation surface found: https://www.quut.com/gsm/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official upstream provides source archive at source_facts.source-archive but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies lossy speech compression; source_facts.homepage is the official GSM upstream page: https://www.quut.com/gsm/
